channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BitsMoE: Efficient Spectral Energy-Guided Bit Allocation for MoE LLM Quantization
item.description: BitsMoE uses spectral-energy-guided bit allocation to improve MoE LLM quantization in ultra-low-bit regimes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DAStatFormer: A Hybrid Multibranch Transformer with Statistical Feature Integration for DAS-Based Pattern Recognitions
item.description: DAStatFormer hybrid Transformer extracts multi-domain statistical features from distributed acoustic sensing data for event classification, achieving 99.4% accuracy with reduced computational cost.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models with Applications to Overhead Images
item.description: Hoeffding Concept Bottleneck Models use gradient-boosted tree decomposition for non-linear concept aggregation, improving explainability and accuracy over linear bottleneck approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Demonstrations to Rewards: Test-Time Prompt Optimization for VLM Reward Models
item.description: Demo2Reward optimizes VLM-based reward model prompts using few demonstrations to improve robotic policy learning without additional training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Shared Valence Axis Across Modern LLMs and Human EEG: The Saturation Regularity
item.description: LLMs and human EEG share a common emotional valence structure, but explicit alignment methods don't improve brain activity decoding.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks (ADNTNs) for Exponential Compression of Deep Neural Networks
item.description: Automatically Differentiable Nonlinear Tensor Networks compress neural networks 2,000x to 77,000x while maintaining or improving accuracy through structured weight generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization
item.description: FoLoRA optimizes fine-tuning of foundation models by balancing downstream task performance against degradation of non-target capabilities using spectral methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] World Models: A Comprehensive Survey of Architectures, Methodologies, Reasoning Paradigms, and Applications
item.description: arXiv survey proposes unified taxonomy for world models across four dimensions: architecture, methodology, reasoning strategies, and applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training
item.description: On Effectiveness and Efficiency of Agentic Tool-calling and RL Training

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey
item.description: Generative AI and Digital Ecosystem Resilience: A Proactive Lifecycle-Based Survey

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows
item.description: Geometric Erasure by Contrastive Velocity Matching in Rectified Flows

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance
item.description: Adaptive data selection improves wearable prediction under low baseline performance

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding
item.description: BudgetDraft: Acceptance-Aware Multi-View Training for Sparse-KV Speculative Decoding

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting
item.description: RAFT: Data Refinement and Adaptive Distillation for Domain Fine-Tuning with Alleviated Forgetting

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying
item.description: Emergence of Exploration in Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning via Retrying

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction
item.description: ChurnNet: A Optimized Modern AI for Churn Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Pathological Prior for EEG-based Depression Detection
item.description: Beyond Augmentation: Score-Guided Pathological Prior for EEG-based Depression Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agentic Transformers Provably Learn to Search via Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Agentic Transformers Provably Learn to Search via Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AI-Guided Design and Optimization of Graphite-Based Anodes via Iterative Experimental Feedback
item.description: AI-Guided Design and Optimization of Graphite-Based Anodes via Iterative Experimental Feedback

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Learning to Construct Practical Agentic Systems
item.description: Learning to Construct Practical Agentic Systems

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BAGEN: Are LLM Agents Budget-Aware?
item.description: BAGEN: Are LLM Agents Budget-Aware?

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Rashomon Theory to PRAXIS: Efficient Decision Tree Rashomon Sets
item.description: From Rashomon Theory to PRAXIS: Efficient Decision Tree Rashomon Sets

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quantized Reasoning Models Think They Need to Think Longer, but They Do Not
item.description: Quantized Reasoning Models Think They Need to Think Longer, but They Do Not

item.description: LithoGRPO: Fast Inverse Lithography via GRPO Reinforced Flow Matching

item.description: A Pre-Training Analogue of Grokking in Language Models: Tracing Delayed Grammatical Generalization

item.description: InfoAtlas: A Foundation Model for Zero-Shot Statistical Dependence Estimate

item.description: ARCA: Adapter-Residual Credit Assignment When Token Signals Degenerate

item.description: When Softmax Fails at the Top: Extreme Value Corrections for InfoNCE
